allow: Bash(mkdir -p "d:/项目/点菜小程序/utils" "d:/项目/点菜小程序/components/wheel" "d:/项目/点菜小程序/pages/index" "d:/项目/点菜小程序/pages/add" "d:/项目/点菜小程序/pages/list")

Bash(node -e "var fs=require\('fs'\); var html=fs.readFileSync\('点菜转盘.html','utf8'\); var s=html.indexOf\('<script>'\); var e=html.lastIndexOf\('</script>'\); var js=html.substring\(s+8,e\); try{new Function\(js\); console.log\('JS syntax OK'\)}catch\(err\){console.log\('Syntax error:',err.message\)}")
